name: Diablo The Abyss
short_description: Diablo The Abyss is a strategic RPG full of random and roguelike elements. Within this randomized world, you can freely make strageties at your own pace and conquer formidable challenges, while shaping your unique adventure journey.
detailed_description:
Waking up from a deep sleep, you found yourself lost in another world - Diablo the Abyss!
This's a treacherous place, where danger lurks and monsters roam freely.
Determined to find a way back home, you embark on the adventure.




Key Features:


  • Random World: Explore an eighteen-floors Great Abyss with randomly generated terrains, environments, and events. Brace yourself for entirely unknown challenges and thrilling opportunities!
  • Diverse Terrains: Venture through various landscapes, from fruit-laden forests and mineral-rich rocky terrains to fish-filled yet treacherous water bodies. Unravel the mysteries of dangerous zones like deserts, swamps, and snowy regions, rarely visited by humans.
  • Freedom of Strategy: Plan your time freely. Are you working in the city or embarking on daring adventures? Gathering fruits for food or mining for money? Adapt your strategy to the ever-changing resources and the random world!
  • Abundant Equipments: Over 500 equipments with random quality and random affixes! Catering to your styles and building strategies.
  • Fortuitous Teammates: Over 70 different characters, each with unique attributes and skills! You may fortuitously meet some of them in your journey. How will you develop them, and then form a tacit and powerful team team?
  • Concise Main Plot: Seamlessly blend the richness of random gameplay with a straightforward and compelling narrative, making your gaming experience purposeful and engaging.
